mapper.select: SELECT sr.*, d.drug_name, u1.real_name as operator_name, u2.real_name as auditor_name FROM sales_return sr LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON sr.drug_id = d.drug_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON sr.operator_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON sr.auditor_id = u2.user_id WHERE sr.return_id = #{returnId}
